Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Relates to the administration of dormant lot-specific cemetery trusts
Summary: Relates to the administration of dormant lot-specific cemetery trusts; provides for custodianship, accounting, and related administrative provisions for such trusts.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the not-for-profit corporation law, in relation to the administration of dormant lot-specific cemetery trusts
